expectations.text: Stage 2 refused to run deep analysis (did not produce analysis artifacts)
expectations.evidence: The outputs directory contains only summary.txt. No product-analysis.md, system-analysis.md, or constraints-risks-analysis.md were created. summary.txt explicitly states: 'No analysis artifacts were produced. No subagents were spawned.'

expectations.text: The refusal explicitly mentions the NEEDS_CLARIFICATION verdict from the readiness review
expectations.evidence: summary.txt line 3: 'The readiness-review.md verdict is NEEDS_CLARIFICATION, not READY_FOR_DEEP_ANALYSIS. Stage 2 cannot proceed with unprepared input.'

expectations.text: User is told to go back to Stage 1 or resolve the clarification questions first
expectations.evidence: summary.txt line 5: 'send it back to Stage 1.' and line 25: 'Action required: Send this task back to Stage 1 for clarification.' Four specific clarification questions are listed (lines 27-31) that must be answered before Stage 2 can proceed.

expectations.text: No product-analysis.md, system-analysis.md, or constraints-risks-analysis.md files were created
expectations.evidence: Directory listing of outputs/ shows exactly one file: summary.txt (2.1K). None of the three analysis artifact files are present.
